title: DockerImageName
content:
# DockerImageName

Inherits from: KSDKModel


Docker image name parser
>>> image = DockerImageName.parse('alpha.kelvininc.com:5000/someapp:1.0.0@sha256:14bf...')
>>> image
DockerImageName(hostname='alpha.kelvininc.com:5000', name='someapp', tag='1.0.0', digest='sha256:14bf...')


## Methods


### parse(name: str) -> DockerImageName


### name_with_version() -> str


### repository_image_name() -> str


### repository_image_name_without_version() -> str


### container_name() -> str
summary: Docker image name parser >>> image = DockerImageName.parse('alpha.kelvininc.com:5000/someapp:1.0.0@sha256:14bf...') >>> image DockerImageName(hostname='alpha.kelvininc.com:5000', name='someapp', tag='1.0.0', digest='sha256:14bf...')
